E. Other 

 • Thermometers; and 

• Tongue depressors. 

There are occasions when the supplies listed in the above examples would be considered 
nonroutine and thus would be considered a billable supply, i.e., if they are required in 
quantity, for recurring need, and are included in the plan of care. Examples include, but 
are not limited to, tape, and 4x4s for major dressings.
